global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with various food-related icons and promotional text.
global.main_message: QuickFork offers quick dinner solutions with late-night deals.

elements.label: Green gradient background
elements.description: A smooth green gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: App interface elements
elements.description: A series of simple icons representing food items and utensils arranged in a grid layout.

elements.label: Food icons
elements.description: Stylized icons of food items, such as a plate and utensils, displayed prominently.

elements.label: Food preparation icons
elements.description: Icons depicting food preparation actions, like chopping and mixing, in a clean design.

elements.label: Cooking icons
elements.description: Icons illustrating cooking methods, such as boiling and frying, in a minimalistic style.

elements.label: Additional food icons
elements.description: More icons representing various food items, arranged in a visually appealing manner.

elements.label: Cooking tools icons
elements.description: Icons of cooking tools like pots and pans, designed with a modern aesthetic.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: A small decorative icon that adds visual interest, possibly a leaf or herb.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: Another small decorative icon, enhancing the overall design with a subtle touch.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: A small icon that complements the theme, possibly representing freshness or health.

elements.label: Small decorative icon
elements.description: A tiny icon that adds to the visual appeal, likely related to food or cooking.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold text stating 'Dinner in minutes' with a secondary line about late-night deals.
elements.text_content: Dinner in minutes Late-night deals available

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo of 'QuickFork' displayed prominently at the top, featuring a modern font.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A clear and inviting button that says 'Try for free', encouraging user interaction.

elements.label: Secondary text
elements.description: Text reading 'Adetlanty', likely a brand or feature name, presented in a smaller font.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small badge that says 'SALE', designed to catch the viewer's attention.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC', indicating user-generated content, placed in a corner.
